name: First Mining Gold Corp.
description: First Mining Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold developer focused on advancing two of the largest gold projects in Canada: the Springpole Gold Project in northwestern Ontario and the Duparquet Gold Project in Quebec. The company also holds a significant portfolio of gold projects across Canada, including the Cameron, Hope Brook, and Pickle Crow projects. Founded in 2015 by Mr. Keith Neumeyer, First Mining Gold aims to create value through the development and monetization of its high-quality gold assets in tier-one mining jurisdictions.
